case_title: ABI FAMILY HOUSING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, VS. RESNICK & LOUIS, P.C. AN ARIZONA PROFESSIONAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
